data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 97,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.50% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 14, 2025, 03:50 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 97,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 97,082.96875 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.50% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: A whale spent $2.54 million on two memecoins named after CZ’s dogs
data.description: Lookonchain monitoring shows that a whale spent $2.54 million to buy two memecoins named after CZ’s dog (Broccoli). Currently, one of the memecoins has a profit of $530,000 (up 24.7%), while the other has a loss of $302,400 (down 68.1%).

data.title: LBank has launched Broccoli1 (BROCCOLI1) for the first time
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LBank has launched Broccoli1 (BROCCOLI1) for the first time at 11:00 (SGT) on February 14, and opened the BROCCOLI1/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 11:00 on February 15.

data.title: Suspected insider address bought Broccoli on BSC at the first opportunity, making a profit of over $6.1 million
data.description: On-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that the insider address/smart money 0x5e7...6579a made a profit of more than $6.1 million, with a return rate of 8862%, because it bought Broccoli on BSC at the first time. It is reported that the address spent 99 WBNB to buy 122 million tokens (12% of the total) at an average price of $0.00056. Currently, 93% of the holdings have been sold at a selling price of $0.04417.

data.title: Ether's Sentiment Hits Low, Potential Price Reversal Expected
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, Ether's market sentiment has likely reached its lowest point, suggesting a potential near-term price reversal. Ed Hindi, co-founder of Swiss investment firm Tyr Capital, highlighted in a February 13 market report that Ethereum has hit peak bearishness and is now at a critical juncture. Hindi anticipates that Ether could retest the $4,000 mark in the coming months, as weaker investors have exited the market.

Hindi compared the current Ether market to Bitcoin's state before the launch of spot exchange-traded funds (ETFs) in the United States in January 2024. He expects institutions holding Bitcoin to begin incorporating Ether into their portfolios. At the time of publication, Ether (ETH) is trading at $2,673, reflecting a 0.64% decline over the past week, as reported by CoinMarketCap.

The sentiment surrounding Ether remains weak, as noted by Unchained podcast host Laura Shin. She observed that Ethereum founder Vitalik Buterin's controversial comment to "make communism great again" has garnered more attention than the news of 21Shares' request to include staking in its spot Ether ETF. Following 21Shares' filing on February 12, Ether briefly rose by 3.5% to $2,776 but lost those gains within 24 hours.

Crypto analyst Johnny remarked to his 808,000 followers on X that it is "honestly comical" how Ether has completely retraced its ETF staking pump. Meanwhile, Tyr Capital's Hindi expressed optimism, suggesting that Ether could surge to $4,000 in the coming months and potentially reach new all-time highs of $5,000 in 2025, representing gains of 49% and 86% from its current price, respectively. Several crypto commentators share Hindi's outlook, predicting an imminent price increase for ETH.

Crypto trader Crypto Mister stated in a February 13 post on X that an ETH reversal is only a matter of time. Similarly, crypto trader Poseidon predicted on the same day that Ether's price would exceed $10,000 by March. This article does not offer investment advice or recommendations. Every investment and trading decision involves risk, and readers are encouraged to conduct their own research before making any decisions.

data.title: SlowMist Warning: Two suspicious transactions occurred on ETH and BSC chains. The attacked contract may be due to missing parameters in the swap function.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News SlowMist Security Team issued a warning saying: "We detected two suspicious transactions using the same method on the ETH and BSC chains respectively. The attacked contract may have failed to check the incoming parameters in its swap-like function, allowing the attacker to construct malicious tokens and make profits. However, these contracts are not open source."

data.title: Ethereum’s Revenue Drops 92% As Solana Sees Explosive Growth
data.description:
Ethereum’s revenue has dropped significantly, while Solana continues to see remarkable growth. Data from DeFiLlama and Token Terminal shows Ethereum’s revenue fell 92.1% in week six of 2025. Meanwhile, Solana has outperformed Ethereum in multiple revenue metrics, fueled by increased memecoin trading and institutional adoption. Ethereum Struggles with Revenue Decline Ethereum experienced...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/13/ethereums-revenue-drops-92-as-solana-sees-explosive-growth/

data.title: ZkLend Initiates Investigation After Hack, Reports Submitted to Authorities
data.description: According to Odaily, zkLend has announced that due to the hacker's failure to contact the project team by the deadline, they have reported the incident to the Hong Kong police, the FBI, and the Department of Homeland Security, initiating an investigation. The investigation has revealed connections between the hacker and previous attacks on other DeFi protocols. The project team has been monitoring the flow of funds and has identified several related wallet addresses, with this information submitted to centralized exchanges. zkLend plans to announce a fund recovery and release strategy next week, while their security team is preparing a post-incident analysis report.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sees $177 Million Liquidation in 24 Hours
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market experienced liquidations totaling $177 million over the past 24 hours. Long positions accounted for $119 million of the liquidations, while short positions saw $57.78 million liquidated. Bitcoin faced liquidations amounting to $27.67 million, and Ethereum saw $26.46 million in liquidations.
